_comment: Build presets for the UI. `stats` are attribute levels; `loadout` is an optional default weapon/affinity/upgrade to select with the preset.

presets.name: Vera Aletheia
presets.description: Dan's samurai — Dex/Arcane bleed, two-handed Rivers of Blood.

presets.name: Quality
presets.description: Balanced Strength/Dexterity — flexible across most weapons.

presets.name: Dex Faith
presets.description: Dexterity + Faith — sacred/lightning infusions and incantation support.

presets.name: Arcane Bleed
presets.description: Dexterity + Arcane — occult/blood infusions, maximum hemorrhage.
